title: Seafood Boil
description: Makes the Nautilus edible! (And mollusks huntable)
body:
A regular Seafood Boil.

---- 📝 SUMMARY 📝 1) Adds a recipe for "Raw Seafood Boil" crafted from nautilus shells and other foods. 2) Lets you cook the Seafood Boil to create a spicy, premium food that doesn't haunt you. 3) Adds an enchantment that makes hunting mollusks easier.
![Seafood Boil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c428dabd46c2a5580bab8f97fda2672a020f6cdd_0.webp) 📚 INFO 📚
🧩Compatibility🧩

Seafood Boil is compatible with 1.21.11. I have no plans to continue to support this project into future versions. Beyond the listed version, test in your worlds at your own risk.

📺Video Showcase📺
